#Step1 Data Exploration
table(luad_anot_clean$paper_expression_subtype)
table(luad_anot_clean$ajcc_pathologic_stage)

#normal tissue samples
table_type <- table(substr(luad_anot_clean$barcode, 14, 15))
names(table_type) <- c("Tumor (01)", "Normal (11)")
table_type
#there are only 44 normale tissue samples
